subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest to behold the eternal Beauty! So far as thou art able, be thou swift and nimble in the path of God, and be not perturbed by the foes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق مشاهده جمال باقی تا توانی در سبیل الهی چابک و چالاک شو و از اعدا بی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @attaining the life of the spirit, @the concourse on high
